channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India issues travel advisory for DRC, Uganda and South Sudan amid Ebola outbreak
item.description: The Government of India has issued a travel advisory urging its citizens to avoid non-essential travel to the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda, and South Sudan in view of the ongoing Ebola out...

item.title: Some Arsenal Players May Miss Premier League Winners’ Medals Despite Title Victory Due to Appearance Rules
item.description: Arsenal have officially clinched the Premier League title after a strong season that ended their 22-year wait for the trophy. The Gunners secured the championship when Manchester City dropped points a...

item.title: Article Highlights Research Linking Low-Dose Radiation Exposure in Children to Increased Cancer Risk
item.description: The article discusses concerns about the health effects of low-dose ionizing radiation exposure in children, particularly in relation to medical imaging and emissions from nuclear facilities. It cites...

item.title: Blast derails shuttle train near Chaman Phatak in Quetta, casualties feared
item.description: A shuttle train travelling from Quetta Cantonment to Quetta Railway Station was hit by a powerful blast near Chaman Phatak on Sunday morning, causing fears of multiple casualties. According to reports...

item.title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of alleged dowry death of 33-year-old woman in Madhya Pradesh
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has taken suo motu cognisance of the death of a 33-year-old woman, Twisha Sharma, in Madhya Pradesh, amid serious allegations of dowry harassment and possible murder. Accord...

item.title: Sundowns remain focused ahead of decisive CAF Champions League clash in Morocco despite travel disruptions
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns head into their decisive CAF Champions League second leg against AS FAR Rabat with confidence and calm determination, holding a 1-0 advantage from the first leg in Pretoria. Despite ...

item.title: Lawyer of Sen. Bato dela Rosa denies he is armed and dangerous amid ICC arrest warrant concerns
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa’s legal counsel, Atty. Jimmy Bondoc, has strongly denied the National Bureau of Investigation’s (NBI) classification of the senator as “armed and dangerous” amid ongoin...

item.title: Jane Green reflects on marriage breakdown and evolving sexuality in memoir
item.description: In this memoir excerpt, bestselling novelist Jane Green describes the collapse of what she once believed was her “perfect” family life, revealing it to have been emotionally and practically unsustaina...

item.title: Anthony Scaramucci Says Trump Would Likely Insult Him Even After His Death
item.description: Former White House communications director Anthony Scaramucci posted a highly critical message about President Donald Trump on X, continuing his long-running public feud with his former boss. In the p...

item.title: Actor Stewart McLean found dead in suspected homicide after being reported missing in Canada
item.description: Canadian actor Stewart McLean, best known for his role in the Netflix series Virgin River, has been found dead days after he was reported missing in the Lions Bay area near Vancouver, Canada. He was 4...

item.title: Ogun court sentences 27-year-old man to 12 years imprisonment for trafficking two minors
item.description: A 27-year-old man, Chukwuemeka Iheamama, has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for trafficking two 15-year-old girls for exploitation. The judgment was delivered by the Federal High Court in Abeoku...

item.title: Passengers Support Grieving Man Travelling from Diani to Nairobi After Mother’s Death
item.description: Paul Gathuma shared an emotional experience of how strangers comforted him during a difficult flight from Diani to Nairobi after learning about the death of his mother. According to his account, he bo...

item.title: Photographs Documenting the Extreme Winter of 1962–1963 in the United Kingdom
item.description: The article presents a curated collection of 45 historical photographs illustrating the severe winter known as the Big Freeze of 1962–1963 in the United Kingdom. This period is widely regarded as one ...

item.title: DSWD to distribute cash aid to 50,000 transport workers in Pasay
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) is set to roll out a large-scale cash assistance program targeting around 50,000 riders and drivers in Pasay City. The initiative forms part of ...

item.title: NRC boosts Lagos–Ibadan train services for Sallah travel rush
item.description: The Nigerian Railway Corporation (NRC) has announced a temporary increase in train services on the Lagos–Ibadan Train Service corridor ahead of the Eid-El-Kabir (Sallah) celebration scheduled for May ...

item.title: Study Links Hypothalamic Menin Decline to Aging and Cognitive Impairment in Mice
item.description: Researchers from Xiamen University reported new findings suggesting that a protein called Menin may play an important role in regulating aging processes in mice. The study, published in PLOS Biology, ...

item.title: Nathaniel Parker honours his mother through Samuel Johnson reading for Celebration Day
item.description: Actor Nathaniel Parker has taken part in a commemorative short film for Celebration Day, a nationwide initiative encouraging people to pause and remember loved ones who have shaped their lives. In the...

item.title: Photos Document Priscilla Beaulieu’s Teenage Years in West Germany Before Moving to Elvis Presley’s World
item.description: The article looks back at a series of photographs showing Priscilla Beaulieu, later known as Priscilla Presley, during her teenage years in West Germany between 1960 and 1962. The period followed her ...

item.title: Weekly Horoscope Forecast Highlights Emotional Awareness and Personal Determination
item.description: Astrologer Sally Brompton’s horoscope for May 24, 2026, provides guidance for all zodiac signs, emphasizing emotional balance, personal confidence, and practical decision-making during the coming week...

item.title: Investigation launched after Chinese investor found burned at National Museum
item.description: Authorities in the country are currently investigating a disturbing incident in which the body of a Chinese investor was found burned at the National Museum. According to law enforcement reports, emer...
